---
title: "Student Weekly Report"
author: "EduVision System"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
params:
  student_name: "Student Name"
  student_number: "STU-XXXX"
  program: "Program Name"
  year_of_study: 1
  week_display: "Week X, Year"
  week_start: "2024-01-01"
  week_end: "2024-01-07"
  weekly_attendance: data.frame()
  emotion_trends: data.frame()
  concentration_trends: data.frame()
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)

emotion_colors <- c(
  "happy" = "#10b981",
  "sad" = "#3b82f6",
  "angry" = "#ef4444",
  "fearful" = "#f59e0b",
  "surprised" = "#06b6d4",
  "neutral" = "#6b7280",
  "confused" = "#8b5cf6"
)
